items.title: SCHD vs. QQQI: Dividend Growth or Monthly Cash—What’s Better?
items.description: How do you define a “better” exchange traded funds (ETF) for passive income investors? You might prefer an ETF with an established track record of dividend growth. Alternatively, you may choose a fund that offers a higher dividend yield and pays its distributions more often. Your financial freedom could depend on your ability to pick ... SCHD vs. QQQI: Dividend Growth or Monthly Cash—What’s Better?
